title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Martin Omander presents five planning tactics for using Antigravity 2.0 on complex enterprise codebases: breaking repository walls, organizing coding standards hierarchically, containing blast radius through sandboxing, using voice input for context, and using the /grill-me command to surface fuzzy requirements before execution. The video emphasizes setting guardrails and rules to keep agent-driven code generation secure and minimize debugging.
